04 = Unable to use the shower or tub, but able to bathe self independently with or without the user of devices at the sink in chair, or on commode.
05 = Unable to use the shower or tub, but able to participate in bathing self in bed, at the sink, in bedside chair, on commode, with the assistance or supervision of another person.
06 = Unable to participate effectively in bathing and is bathed totally by another person. CHAR 2 x x x x x
